[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 1000000000 1
2 0000000100 1
3 0000010110 3
4 0011111000 5
5 1100001001 4
6 1000001101 4
7 0011100001 4

01 10 1000001101 4 match 6
12 21 0010100001 3
23 32 0010100000 2
34 43 0000100000 1
45 54 0000000000 a match 0
56 65 0000000100 1 match 2
67 76 0001110000 3
70 07 0000001000 1
